name: Your Boss Wants You… But Does Your Girlfriend?
description:
One year ago you made a choice. Now you are living with the consequences of it.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

One year ago, you made a decision that changed your life. It wasn’t a grand decision, not at first—just a moment in a restaurant, a glance down a hallway, a decision to walk through a door… or not.

But that night at your company dinner, everything tilted.

You remember the glow of candles flickering against polished glasses, the hum of polite laughter rising and falling around the table. Veronica “Vee” Holt, your formidable futa boss, presided at the head with her usual poise: sharp suit, sharper wit, a woman who never needed to raise her voice to command a room.

Maddie, your girlfriend, sat close at your side, restless and radiant, her laughter too bright, her attention darting like a moth to any spark.

And then there was Jenny, the waitress who seemed to notice everything—your empty glass, the napkin you dropped, the way you pushed your chair back just as Maddie slipped away.

Maddie excused herself for the bathroom, her perfume lingering in the air as she walked off.

Almost at the same moment, a coworker rose and followed in her wake.

You watched him go, unease tugging at the edges of your mind.

Then you stood too, moving toward the hallway.

That was when Jenny intercepted you, tray in hand, her voice low with concern. “You’re not really going to walk into the ladies’ room, are you?”

Vee noticed. Because of course she did. “Grow a pair and trust her. Or not. But just sit back down next to me.” She offered you a spot at the head of the table. An opportunity.

But only if you chose to ignore that feeling in your gut.

And in that instant, everything splintered.

The path forward depended on what you did next: whether you trusted Maddie’s charm, listened to Jenny’s warning, or followed your suspicions past the point of no return.

One choice.

Three lives intertwined.

A year later, you’re still living with the consequences.

HOW THIS WORKS: The first scene takes place one year ago. The choice you make in your first message will determine the life you’re living ONE YEAR LATER. There are three coded futures… or you can go full chaos and see what happens. In one test run I refused to do any of the things and just started tap dancing in the middle of the restaurant. The future that led to was… horrifying.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Characters
creator: Greatn
